summary: When fetching base file content to compute a formatter delta for a `main...HEAD` three-dot diff, use `git merge-base main HEAD` for the base ref, then `git show "$MERGE_BASE:{filepath}"`. Using `git show "main:{filepath}"` references main's current tip — on branches where main later updated the file, the wrong base produces false positives (feature hunk mis-classified as formatter-only) or false negatives. path:dark-factory/scripts/fmt_hunk_filter.py
